scripts.dev: concurrently -n "FE,BE" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host" "conda run -n py312 uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && conda run -n py312 pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.start: npm run build && conda run -n py312 uvicorn backend.main:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0
